name: Pine Bluff
summary: A small city in southeastern Arkansas exploring how limited broadband access shapes STEM aspirations.

name: Rural Retreat
summary: Nestled in the Appalachian mountains, this town's high school has one science teacher for all grades.

name: Broken Bow
summary: In the heart of the Sandhills, students here drive over an hour to reach the nearest community college.

name: Marfa
summary: A tiny West Texas town where art thrives but STEM resources remain scarce.

name: Salmon
summary: Surrounded by wilderness, Salmon's students are resourceful but face geographic isolation from STEM opportunities.
